title: DIG Network status.json
description: Current health snapshot for the central DIG Network systems, produced server-side by the status.dig.net probe cron and committed to public/status.json. This is the canonical, versioned machine contract for the document. schemaVersion is bumped only on a breaking change.

$schema.description: Self-reference to this JSON Schema, so the document is self-describing.

schemaVersion.description: Version of THIS document schema. Bumped only on a breaking change to the shape; additive fields do not bump it.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this snapshot was assembled.

overall.description: Worst-of rollup across all non-excluded systems.

summary.description: Per-state counts. `total` counts every system (including excludeFromOverall ones).

systems.description: One record per monitored system, in the order defined by lib/targets.js.

status.description: The stable health-state enum. 'up' = reachable + healthy; 'degraded' = reachable but impaired (slow / wrong-but-live response / JSON-RPC error / not-synced / stale peak / unreachable optional); 'down' = unreachable or hard-failed (no response / DNS / TLS / 5xx).

errorCode.description: Stable, catalogued machine failure code attached to a non-up check, so an agent branches on the code instead of the human `error` prose.

id.description: Stable system identifier (matches lib/targets.js and history.json keys).

category.description: Grouping label for the dashboard (e.g. 'Read path', 'Control plane', 'Sites', 'Chia').

latencyMs.description: Probe round-trip latency in milliseconds, clamped to a non-negative integer. 0 for synthetic/derived rows.

checkedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp this system was checked.

url.description: The probed endpoint (absent for derived rows).

error.description: Human-readable failure detail when not up (e.g. 'fetch failed', 'timeout'). Branch on detail.errorCode, not this string.

excludeFromOverall.description: When true the system is shown + counted in summary but does NOT influence `overall` (e.g. an optional, not-yet-provisioned endpoint).

peakHeight.description: Convenience copy of the latest Chia peak height (present only on the coinset record, used for cross-run freshness).

detail.description: Probe-kind-specific detail. The `kind` discriminator selects which extra fields are present.

httpStatus.description: (kind=http) HTTP status code, or null on a transport failure.

host.description: (kind=tls) The host the TLS handshake was attempted against.

port.description: (kind=tls) The port the TLS handshake was attempted against.

rpcError.description: (kind=jsonrpc) The JSON-RPC error object returned, when the service answered with an error.

peakHeight.description: (kind=chainview|derived) Chia mainnet peak block height, or null.

synced.description: (kind=chainview) Whether the node reports it is synced, or null.

advancedBy.description: (kind=derived) How many blocks the peak advanced since the previous probe (null on first run).

secondsSincePrev.description: (kind=derived) Wall-clock seconds since the previous recorded peak.
